menu_options.phone: Send me an SMS code (uses my existing Intratone account)
menu_options.invite: I have an installer invitation code (`XXXXXX-XXXX`)

phone.title: Sign in by SMS
phone.description: Enter the phone number registered on your Intratone account. Intratone will text a 4-digit code to that number.

sms.title: Enter the SMS code
sms.description: Type the 4-digit code Intratone just texted you.

invite.title: Pair with an invitation code
invite.description: Open the official Intratone app → 'Mes infos' → 'Ajouter un appareil' to generate an invitation code (format: `448789-1206`).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-pair with Intratone
reauth_confirm.description: Your Intratone credentials have expired. Generate a new invitation code in the official app and enter it below.

reconfigure.title: Transfer the CléMobil to Home Assistant
reconfigure.description:
Since mid-2026, Intratone lets only one device per phone number open doors remotely (the “CléMobil” / Mobipass key). Continuing sends a one-time code by SMS to your phone number and moves the key to Home Assistant.

**Remote opening will stop working in the official Intratone app on your phone** until you transfer it back there. Doorbell calls and opening a door during a call are unaffected.

mobipass_otp.title: Enter the transfer code
mobipass_otp.description: Type the code Intratone just texted you to finish moving the CléMobil to Home Assistant.

error.invalid_code: The invitation code was rejected by Intratone. Generate a fresh one and try again.
error.invalid_sms_code: The SMS code was rejected. Check the number you entered and try again.
error.sms_failed: Intratone refused to send an SMS to this phone. Check the number and country code.
error.fcm_failed: Could not register with Firebase Cloud Messaging. Check your internet connection.
error.auth_failed: Could not authenticate with Intratone after registration.
error.mobipass_code_invalid: The transfer code was rejected. Check it and try again.
error.mobipass_code_blocked: Too many attempts — the transfer code is temporarily blocked. Try again later.
error.mobipass_not_available: The CléMobil feature isn’t available for your account.
error.mobipass_failed: The CléMobil transfer failed. Check the logs and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Intratone device is already configured.
abort.mobipass_transfer_successful: The CléMobil is now active on Home Assistant. Your doors should appear shortly.
abort.mobipass_already_active: The CléMobil is already active on Home Assistant — nothing to transfer.
abort.mobipass_not_eligible: Your account doesn’t use the CléMobil single-owner scheme, so there’s nothing to transfer.
abort.not_loaded: The Intratone integration must be loaded before transferring the CléMobil.

mobipass_transfer.title: Transfer the CléMobil to Home Assistant

confirm.title: Transfer the CléMobil to Home Assistant
confirm.description:
Intratone lets only one device per phone number open doors remotely (the “CléMobil” / Mobipass key), and it is currently held by another device — so your remote-open doors don’t appear in Home Assistant.

Continuing sends a one-time code by SMS to your phone number and moves the key here. **Remote opening will stop working in the official Intratone app on your phone** until you transfer it back. Doorbell calls and opening a door during a call are unaffected.

otp.title: Enter the transfer code
otp.description: Type the code Intratone just texted you to finish moving the CléMobil to Home Assistant.

error.mobipass_code_invalid: The transfer code was rejected. Check it and try again.
error.mobipass_code_blocked: Too many attempts — the transfer code is temporarily blocked. Try again later.
error.mobipass_not_available: The CléMobil feature isn’t available for your account.
error.mobipass_failed: The CléMobil transfer failed. Check the logs and try again.

abort.not_loaded: The Intratone integration must be loaded before transferring the CléMobil.

data_description.video_enabled: Negotiates VP8 video with the Intratone gateway and forwards it to go2rtc. Leave off for audio-only mode.
data_description.go2rtc_url: RTSP URL where go2rtc listens. Default: rtsp://127.0.0.1:8554. HA OS users with the embedded go2rtc should use rtsp://127.0.0.1:18554.

simulate_ring.name: Simulate doorbell ring
simulate_ring.description: Inject a fake doorbell push for testing without the physical intercom.

door_name.name: Door name
door_name.description: Human label shown on the event payload.
